data.title: CZ: I have browsed a number of prediction market projects on BNB Chain, but I am not sure about the potential market size.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that he had just taken a quick look at more than 20 prediction market startups on BNB Chain. He said that perhaps someone would have the opportunity to build an oracle specifically for prediction markets. He was not sure how big the potential market (TAM) was, but it might be worth a try.

data.title: BlackRock deposited 272.4 BTC to Coinbase and withdrew 12,098 ETH
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, BlackRock deposited 272.4 BTC (US$28.36 million) into Coinbase Prime about 5 hours ago; and 1 hour ago, BlackRock withdrew 12,098 ETH (US$45.47 million) from Coinbase Prime.

data.title: Altcoin crash puts 100+ ETF applications on ice as Wall Street scrambles
data.description:
Wall Street’s attempt to cash in on the altcoin wave just hit a wall. Over 130 ETF applications tied to risky crypto tokens are now effectively frozen, after a violent crash last week erased billions of dollars and exposed how thin, unstable, and illiquid most of these coins still are. The same applications that flooded […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/altcoin-crash-puts-etf-applications-on-ice/

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of 4,998 BTC, while the Ethereum ETF had a net inflow of 4,202 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 4,998 BTC, of ​​which ARK 21Shares had an outflow of 2,544 BTC, and currently holds 42,474 BTC; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 4,202 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 12,098 ETH, and currently holds 4,052,934 ETH.

data.title: Analysis: The road to the upside for risk assets will be more turbulent
data.description: Trading information platform Kobeissi Letter published an article on the X platform stating that US investor leverage has nearly doubled over the past two years, a similar rate of growth to the post-pandemic period in 2020. In September, US investors took on an additional $67 billion in margin debt, bringing the total to a record $1.13 trillion. 5x leveraged ETFs for US stocks have just been submitted to the SEC. These ETFs will cover everything from Nvidia to cryptocurrencies. This means that if Nvidia drops 10% in a single day, the leveraged ETFs will drop 50%, making the upward trajectory of risky assets even more volatile. Risk appetite is at an all-time high, with everyone eager to participate in the AI ​​revolution. US household stock allocations have reached a record 52%, exceeding the 2000 peak of 48% by 4 percentage points and doubling the 2008 low. Americans are flocking to the stock market.

data.title: ZachXBT alerted CZ to a suspected scam account that frequently changed its username.
data.description: On-chain detective ZachXBT posted on the X platform: "CZ, be careful! An X account you are following may be a scammer. The account has changed its username multiple times, with the last change being one day ago."

data.title: FIFA Hit With Swiss Criminal Complaint Over NFT World Cup Ticket Vouchers
data.description:
FIFA's Avalanche-based NFT collectibles platform is now the subject of a formal criminal complaint filed by Switzerland's gambling authority.
source: https://decrypt.co/344775/fifa-swiss-criminal-complaint-nft-world-cup-ticket-vouchers

data.title: Ethena Labs Launches Stablecoin Service on Conduit Platform
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Ethena Labs has announced the launch of its stablecoin-as-a-service stack, Ethena Whitelabel, on the cross-border payment service provider Conduit. This integration allows chains built using Conduit to access Ethena's infrastructure and create their own stablecoins during deployment.

Conduit supports 55% of chains on Ethereum, with a total locked value exceeding $4 billion across more than 60 mainnet deployments. It powers decentralized finance (DeFi), real-world assets (RWAs), and consumer applications.

data.title: Tether open-sources wallet kit for humans and AI agents on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and beyond
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/375125/tether-open-sources-wallet-kit-humans-ai-agents-bitcoin-ethereum-beyond?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Charles Schwab Reports Surge in Interest for Cryptocurrency Products
data.description: According to PANews, Charles Schwab, a financial services company managing approximately $11 trillion in assets, has observed a significant increase in user interest in its cryptocurrency-related products. The company's cryptocurrency website has experienced a 90% year-over-year increase in visits, reflecting growing engagement in the digital asset sector.
